workingFeatures: L1: Login with school code + email works

issues.title: Student not enrolled in LLD class — all LLD story points return 404
issues.details: Test student (student.test@subhang.academy / SUB001) is not assigned to class cls_g10_lld_a. All 12 LLD story point URLs (e.g. /spaces/XTw3bLqiT4dMyvFJkI0g/story/efDEBIVVuI4GYultzGX8) return a 404 page with h1='404'. Student can only access System Design space (PDFq1OluyAGNAz6Fpx0j) and DSA space (ZikR8xEHkqIaIsugmdQg). Seed must enroll student into LLD class.

issues.title: LLD space not visible in /spaces list — student not enrolled
issues.details: The /spaces page does not show the 'Low-Level Design & OOP' space card because student is not enrolled in cls_g10_lld_a. This is a prerequisite for all LLD learning. Root cause: seed config does not assign student to LLD class enrollment.

issues.title: SpaceViewer crashes for LLD space (same React hooks bug as System Design)
issues.details: When navigating to /spaces/XTw3bLqiT4dMyvFJkI0g directly (L3 test), the space viewer fails to render story points — h1 is not found within timeout. Root cause (from sysdesign learner): SpaceViewerPage.tsx line 103 calls useState(false) AFTER conditional early-returns (lines 63-98), violating React Rules of Hooks. Fix: move all useState calls before line 63.

issues.title: All LLD story points: no content rendered (OOP, Creational, Structural, Behavioral, Clean Arch, Parking Lot, Library, Chess, CQRS, Quiz, Timed Test)
issues.details: All story point pages for the LLD space return 404 because the student lacks enrollment. None of the following are verifiable: UML diagrams, code blocks, multi-language examples, long-form answer textarea, character limits, AI feedback, design scenario completeness.

issues.title: Breadcrumbs not visible on story point pages
issues.details: No breadcrumb nav found via [aria-label*='breadcrumb'], [class*='breadcrumb'], or nav ol selectors. May be correct if 404 pages don't include breadcrumbs.

learningEffectiveness.notes: Learning completely blocked. Student cannot access LLD space or any of its 12 story points due to missing class enrollment (cls_g10_lld_a). Fix: enroll test student in LLD class via seed or admin portal. Secondary blocker: SpaceViewer React hooks crash (same P0 as System Design space).

rootCauses.fix: Seed or admin: assign student.test@subhang.academy (entity: vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK) to class cls_g10_lld_a
Move all useState() calls before the conditional early-returns (before line 63). Specifically: move `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` from line 103 to before line 63.
